internal_notes: Explore feed now reads only curated explore_state=live|featured posts.
Post publish flow now separates visibility from explore_state moderation.
Heuristic ranking foundation added with recency, likes, style diversity, quality, owner, and feature signals.
public_notes: Explore now runs as a curated public layer instead of automatic public dump.
New work remains private by default; publishing to Explore now requires explicit action.
Release system now keeps internal manifest + public What's New entries for shipped versions.
migration_notes: Any private post is normalized to explore_state=hidden.
